blocks.en: Wi-Fi sends your data through the air as radio waves, on public ‘unlicensed’ bands that anyone's devices may use. No wires, but also no exclusive lane — everyone nearby shares the same air.
blocks.zh: Wi-Fi 以无线电波的形式把你的数据送上空中，使用任何人的设备都可使用的公共“免许可”频段。没有线缆，但也没有专属车道——附近的所有人共享同一片空口。

blocks.en: ‘Wi-Fi’ is not one invention; it is a family of rules — the IEEE 802.11 standards — that let independently-made devices agree on how to share that air and understand each other.
blocks.zh: “Wi-Fi”不是单一发明，而是一套规则家族——IEEE 802.11 标准——它让各家独立制造的设备就“如何共享空口、如何相互理解”达成一致。

blocks.en: A standard is a shared agreement. Because your phone and a stranger's router both follow 802.11, they can talk even though different companies built them.
blocks.zh: 标准是一份共同的约定。正因为你的手机和陌生人的路由器都遵循 802.11，即使出自不同公司，它们也能通信。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 420 120' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='11'><rect x='10' y='45' width='70' height='34' rx='5' fill='none' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='45' y='66' text-anchor='middle' fill='currentColor'>Phone</text><rect x='175' y='45' width='70' height='34' rx='5' fill='none' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='210' y='66' text-anchor='middle' fill='currentColor'>AP</text><rect x='340' y='45' width='70' height='34' rx='5' fill='none' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='375' y='66' text-anchor='middle' fill='currentColor'>Internet</text><path d='M85 62 H170' stroke='currentColor' stroke-dasharray='4 3'/><path d='M248 62 H335' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='127' y='40' text-anchor='middle' fill='currentColor'>Wi-Fi (radio)</text><text x='291' y='40' text-anchor='middle' fill='currentColor'>wire/fiber</text></svg>

caption.en: Your device reaches the internet over a wireless hop to an access point.
caption.zh: 你的设备通过到接入点的无线一跳接入互联网。

options.en: A family of IEEE 802.11 standards devices agree to follow
options.zh: 设备共同遵循的 IEEE 802.11 标准家族
